title: SimpleTab
description: The simplest tablist plugin out there
body:
# SimpleTab
SimpleTab is a Spigot plugin that implements the tablist (player list) header/footer configuration and dynamic information.

It has support for [formatting colors](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Formatting_codes) using the ampersand (&) character, and support for [PlaceholderAPI](https://github.com/PlaceholderAPI/PlaceholderAPI).

The rest of the description can be read in the [source repository](https://codeberg.org/FDL/SimpleTab).

## Supported Minecraft versions
| ProtocolLib is installed                  | ProtocolLib is not installed |
|-------------------------------------------|------------------------------|
| 1.8 to any higher version supported by PL | 1.13 to any higher version   |
